## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Server-side auth checks exist.
- [ ] Role checks exist where required.
- [ ] Owner checks exist where required.
- [ ] RLS impact is documented.
- [ ] No secrets are exposed.
- [ ] Uploads validate type, size, count where relevant.
- [ ] Build/lint/tests pass or are explained.
